title: Remind Me
description: Simple way to set reminders in-game
body:
Easy way to set reminders for yourself in-game. Run /remindme (minutes) (message) and after your preset amount of minutes, a toast will pop up with your reminder along with a randomly selected sound to let you know audibly.
